annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under 9 V.S.A. § 41a(a) — 12% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Vermont’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Verify against the statute text. Not legal advice.
